evals.prompt: Write a Cypress test for the game play flow on level 1 with the animais theme
evals.expected_output: A complete Cypress spec file testing game play on nivel1/animais with API mocks, localStorage setup, audio stubs, and game interaction assertions

evals.prompt: My Cypress test keeps failing because the page redirects to login before it loads. How do I fix it?
evals.expected_output: Debugging guidance explaining that localStorage auth token must be set before cy.visit(), with a code example showing the fix

evals.prompt: Create E2E tests that verify a student can complete phases 8-10 word completion and progress is saved
evals.expected_output: Cypress spec file testing word completion phases with letter clicking, slot filling, confetti verification, and progress API assertion
